description: Globally unique identifier for the experiment.
Experiment-prefixed sequential participant identifier; source filenames and timestamps are not exported.
Unique identifier for a trial within an experiment and participant session.
Presentation order within the retained participant session (0-indexed).
Task phase: production, word_decoding, or emotion_decoding.
Participant-visible stimulus: an existing Spanish word in Experiment 1 and a novel Spanish letter string in Experiments 2 and 3.
Original Spanish source word from which the novel string was derived; available in Experiments 2 and 3 and not displayed to participants.
Participant response: a generated novel word in Experiment 1, a guessed Spanish word in Experiment 2, or a selected emotion label in Experiment 3.
Correct emotion category; available in Experiment 3 only.
Binary indicator of whether response matched response_correct; available in Experiment 3 only.
Discrete emotion category associated with the source word: anger, disgust, fear, happiness, or sadness.
Response time in milliseconds; derived from source timing fields as documented in README.md.
Normalized participant gender: female, male, or unspecified.
